title: pimpinella buchananii
intro: Pimpinella buchananii, also known as Black Caraway, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pimpinella buchananii include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as having potential applications in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. Pimpinella buchananii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or used as a spice, and it is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to prepare various formulations.
